mega_corp_ceo_ev_001.title: Analyst Note
mega_corp_ceo_ev_001.body: A major bank publishes a very positive note. The stock goes up and investors feel reassured.

mega_corp_ceo_ev_002.title: Team Week
mega_corp_ceo_ev_002.body: Managers publicly thank the teams. The atmosphere improves a little at last.

mega_corp_ceo_ev_003.title: Surprise Inspection
mega_corp_ceo_ev_003.body: A file lands on the wrong desk. The authorities start looking more closely.

mega_corp_ceo_ev_004.title: Successful Campaign
mega_corp_ceo_ev_004.body: The new campaign is well received. Even critics struggle to find something to attack.

mega_corp_ceo_ev_005.title: Disappointing Quarter
mega_corp_ceo_ev_005.body: Results are falling a bit too low. Investors are becoming more and more worried.

mega_corp_ceo_ev_006.title: Procedure Approved
mega_corp_ceo_ev_006.body: An audit ends without drama. For once, everything was in the right place.

mega_corp_ceo_ev_007.title: Silent Turnover
mega_corp_ceo_ev_007.body: Departures keep piling up quietly. It is discreet, which makes it even more worrying.

mega_corp_ceo_ev_008.title: Mild Bad Buzz
mega_corp_ceo_ev_008.body: A small controversy grows online. Not huge, but enough to stick around for a few days.

mega_corp_ceo_ev_009.title: Exemplary Audit
mega_corp_ceo_ev_009.body: The inspectors leave almost relaxed. That is rare, so everyone notices.

mega_corp_ceo_ev_010.title: Team Bonus
mega_corp_ceo_ev_010.body: A bonus or another concrete benefit arrives at the right time. The atmosphere improves a little.

mega_corp_ceo_ev_011.title: Harsh Article
mega_corp_ceo_ev_011.body: A media outlet publishes a very harsh portrait of your group. The harshest line gets repeated everywhere.

mega_corp_ceo_ev_012.title: Viral Interview
mega_corp_ceo_ev_012.body: A public appearance goes surprisingly well. The clips spread in the right direction.

mega_corp_ceo_ev_013.title: Forecast Revised
mega_corp_ceo_ev_013.body: Targets are revised downward. The market claims it understands, then sells anyway.

mega_corp_ceo_ev_014.title: Smooth Internal Tool
mega_corp_ceo_ev_014.body: A new tool finally makes daily work easier. No one applauds, but everyone feels relieved.

mega_corp_ceo_ev_015.title: Massive Contract
mega_corp_ceo_ev_015.body: A very large contract finally comes through. Shareholders love deals with lots of zeros.

mega_corp_ceo_ev_016.title: Official Reminder
mega_corp_ceo_ev_016.body: A request for clarification arrives in a very polite and not very reassuring tone.

mega_corp_ceo_ev_017.title: Well-Loved Product
mega_corp_ceo_ev_017.body: One of the group's products becomes the favorite of the moment. Customers talk about it better than your PR team does.

mega_corp_ceo_ev_018.title: Managers Under Pressure
mega_corp_ceo_ev_018.body: Tension rises another notch across several teams. Results hold up, morale much less so.

mega_corp_ceo_ev_019.title: Clean File
mega_corp_ceo_ev_019.body: Everything looks tidy on paper. It is almost too perfect, but this time it goes through.

mega_corp_ceo_ev_020.title: Icy Board Meeting
mega_corp_ceo_ev_020.body: The board listens in silence. That is never a good sign for the market's patience.

mega_corp_ceo_ev_021.title: Product Rumor
mega_corp_ceo_ev_021.body: An absurd rumor is spreading very quickly. The vaguer it is, the more it spreads.

mega_corp_ceo_ev_022.title: Strong Recruitment
mega_corp_ceo_ev_022.body: Several key profiles join the group. The teams start thinking maybe everything is not falling apart after all.

mega_corp_ceo_ev_023.title: Target Exceeded
mega_corp_ceo_ev_023.body: A key indicator beats expectations. Investors love it when numbers do the work for you.
mega_corp_ceo_ev_023.effect: Effect: the card message appears without vowels

mega_corp_ceo_ev_024.title: Ambiguous Clause
mega_corp_ceo_ev_024.body: An old clause suddenly draws fresh attention. Lawyers start frowning one after another.
mega_corp_ceo_ev_024.effect: Effect: the card message appears without vowels

mega_corp_ceo_ev_025.title: Brutal Reorganization
mega_corp_ceo_ev_025.body: The new org chart moves fast. So do the employees, but mostly toward the exit.
mega_corp_ceo_ev_025.effect: Effect: the choices appear without vowels

mega_corp_ceo_ev_026.title: Certification Obtained
mega_corp_ceo_ev_026.body: An important certification finally comes through. It is official, stamped, and very convenient to show everywhere.
mega_corp_ceo_ev_026.effect: Effect: the choices appear without vowels

mega_corp_ceo_ev_027.title: Applauded Dividend
mega_corp_ceo_ev_027.body: The announced payout calms quite a few nerves. The market's love stays self-interested, but it comes back fast.
mega_corp_ceo_ev_027.effect: Effect: the card message appears reversed

mega_corp_ceo_ev_028.title: Unfortunate Photo
mega_corp_ceo_ev_028.body: An image taken at the wrong moment goes viral. The internet turns it into a joke.
mega_corp_ceo_ev_028.effect: Effect: the card message appears reversed

mega_corp_ceo_ev_029.title: Too Many Meetings
mega_corp_ceo_ev_029.body: Schedules overflow and teams hit saturation. Nobody knows when the real work is supposed to start anymore.

mega_corp_ceo_ev_030.title: Regulatory Red Carpet
mega_corp_ceo_ev_030.body: Authorities cite your group as an example. That is rare, so it pays off greatly in credibility.
